query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph of a person viewed from behind, standing at a tall window with both arms raised while gripping curtains. The figure appears as a solid dark form against the bright light coming through the window. Vertical window frames border the scene on either side, and fabric drapes downward from the person's hands. The composition centers on the upper body and raised arms of the figure.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white photograph employing exposure extremes, with the daylight through the window blown out to pure white and the human figure crushed into a deep silhouette lacking visible detail. Viewed from behind, a person stands at a tall window with both arms raised while gripping curtains, rendered as a solid dark form against the overexposed background. Vertical window frames border the scene on either side, and fabric drapes downward from the person's hands, as the extreme contrast eliminates surface texture and facial features.
